tool.name: inspect_cmo3_structure.mjs
tool.note: Generic CMO3 structure inspector. No image-specific part names are hardcoded.

checks.message: main.xml was extracted from the CAFF archive.
Missing configured parameter(s): ParamMouthForm, ParamMouthOpenY, ParamHairSide

interpretation: This report proves CMO3 structure presence, not visual motion quality.
Parameter/keyform/deformer presence does not prove that the rig deforms well under extreme values.
Use this as a stronger gate before runtime render and Cubism visual overhang validation.
